pkgmetadata.longdescription: A Video4Linux proxy that masks a webcam's background using TensorFlow Lite and the DeepLab v3 semantic segmentation model. It reads frames from a real webcam, performs person segmentation, replaces the background with a solid color or image, and writes the result to a v4l2loopback virtual camera device for use in video conferencing applications.

use.flag: Enable the TensorFlow Lite OpenGL GPU delegate for hardware-accelerated inference via EGL/OpenGL.
